description: first-principles raises a diverse-perspective concern as a non-blocking thought. It is advisory-only and can never drive REQUEST_CHANGES, so the verdict must be APPROVE even though a reviewer is uneasy about the approach.

evidence_trace: the PR introduces a new flow that overlaps substantially with the existing `legacy-flow.ts`
a thinner adapter over the existing flow may achieve the same outcome
raised as a non-blocking perspective, not a defect
finding.model_authored_prose: Consider whether a thin adapter over the existing flow would meet this need instead of a parallel implementation — non-blocking, just a perspective to weigh.
